text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Kikuka Sho is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan talks about how countless losses to
Mejiro McQueen have pushed her to grow strong
enough to compete with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, McQueen declares that she
will run her hardest against Ryan, who has
become a bona fide contender in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With their rivalry as intense as ever, the two
racers head off to commence their showdown.
